zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Welles於1512年6月21日出生在英國瓦維其可爾其福德時，他的父親Robert Welles27歲，母親Elizabeth Alice Goodrich24歲。他於1537年與Elizabeth Bryan結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1558年8月30日在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾其福德享年46歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾其福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Welles于1512年6月21日出生在英国瓦維其可爾其福德时，他的父亲Robert Welles27岁，母亲Elizabeth Alice Goodrich24岁。他于1537年与Elizabeth Bryan结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1558年8月30日在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾其福德享年46岁，埋葬在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾其福德。

nameMeanings.name: Welles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wells
meanings: English: habitational name from Wells next the Sea (Norfolk) or Wells (Somerset), both named with the plural of Old English wella ‘spring, stream’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a group of springs or streams.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dupuis   ‘from the well’.
History: One of numerous early immigrants from England bearing this name was Thomas Welles, governor of colonial CT, who was in Hartford, CT, by 1636.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Welles was born on 21 June 1512, in Whichford, Warwickshire, England, his father, Robert Welles, was 27 and his mother, Elizabeth Alice Goodrich, was 24. He married Elizabeth Bryan in 1537. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 30 August 1558, in Whichford, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46, and was buried in Whichford, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Welles est né le 21 juin 1512, à Whichford, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Welles, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Alice Goodrich, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Bryan en 1537. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 30 août 1558, à Whichford, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Whichford, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Welles am 21. Juni 1512 in Whichford, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Welles 27 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Alice Goodrich 24. Er hat 1537 Elizabeth Bryan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 30. August 1558 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Whichford, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Whichford, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Welles è nato il il 21 giugno 1512 nel Whichford, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Welles, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Alice Goodrich, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Bryan nel 1537. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 30 agosto 1558, nel Whichford, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Whichford, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Wellesが1512年6月21日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアウィチフォードで生まれた時，父Robert Wellesは27歳，母Elizabeth Alice Goodrichは24歳であった。1537年にElizabeth Bryanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1558年8月30日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアウィチフォードで46歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアウィチフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Welles(이)가 1512년 6월 21일 영국 워윅실르 위ch퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Welles(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Alice Goodrich(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1537년 Elizabeth Bryan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1558년 8월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 위ch퍼드에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 위ch퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.21 June 1512–30 August 1558: 21 de junho de 1512–30 de agosto de 1558
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Welles nasceu em 21 de junho de 1512, em Whichford, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Welles, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Alice Goodrich, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Bryan em 1537. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 30 de agosto de 1558, em Whichford, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Whichford, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Welles родился 21 июня 1512 г. в местности уичфорд, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Welles было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Alice Goodrich, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Bryan в 1537 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 30 августа 1558 г. в местности уичфорд, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности уичфорд, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.21 June 1512–30 August 1558: 21 de junio de 1512–30 de agosto de 1558
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Welles nació el 21 de junio de 1512, en Whichford, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Welles, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Alice Goodrich, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Bryan en 1537. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 30 de agosto de 1558, en Whichford, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Whichford, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
